1. navya 1〉 adj. = nava neu, frisch, jung  NAIGH. 3,28 .  NIR. 3,3 .  P. 5,4,36, Vārtt. 8 .  KĀŚ. _zu_ P. 5,4,30 .  AK. 3,2,27 .  H. 1448 . navyā navyā yuvatayo bhavantīḥ  ṚV. 3,55,16 . navyaṃ navyaṃ tantum 1,159,4 . 10,96,11 . navyamāyuḥ pra sū tira 1,10,11 . ukthya 105,12 . stoma 109,2 . brahman 62,13 . 4,26,21 . vīryā maghavanyā cakartha . yā co nu navyā kṛṇavaḥ 5,29,13 . 2,17,1 . 10,4,5 . sanāyuvo namasā navyo (nom. pl. f.) arkairvasūyavo matayo dasma dadruḥ 1,62,11 .
— 2〉 m. eine best. Pflanze, = raktapunarnavā  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.
